tasks.check: deno check main.ts adapter/ server/ stacks/ system/ tray/ tests/ scripts/
tasks.check:web: cd frontend && deno run -A npm:typescript/tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
tasks.dev:web: cd frontend && deno install && deno run -A npm:vite
tasks.build:web: cd frontend && deno install && deno run -A npm:vite build
tasks.compile: deno compile --no-terminal --icon assets/logo.ico --include assets/logo.ico --include server/worker.ts --include tray/tray_worker.ts --include system/dialog_worker.ts --include frontend/dist --allow-ffi --allow-net "--allow-run=wsl,wslc,reg,explorer,C:\Program Files\WSL\wslc.exe" --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env=WSL_UTF8,WSLC_GUI_TOKEN,WSLC_GUI_PORT,APPDATA,USERPROFILE,TEMP,TMP,LOCALAPPDATA,DENO_DIR,PLUGIN_URL --allow-sys=osRelease -o dist/wslc-gui.exe main.ts
